task: Refactor LangGraph to Support Iterative Tool Loops

key_patterns_discovered: By adding an `actionHistory` state tensor with a concat reducer, ActionActor gained episodic memory over its past function calls during a single task execution.
Returning `internalTurns: 1` dynamically accumulated iterations due to the numeric reducer `(x, y) => x + y`, allowing a hard failsafe loop break in Graph logic (state.internalTurns > 10).
ActionActor naturally forms a ToolNode capability if it dynamically detects `!functionCall` to switch its output logic to task completion.
corrections: Removed the linear START->END edge bound strictly to ActionActor and replaced it with `addConditionalEdges` driven by `isTaskComplete`, turning the workflow from a single-shot script into a reactive multi-step agent.
